text.title: Refactor Baseline Metrics Script Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the refactor non-trivial and worth capturing pre/post metrics?

text.example: PR refactor F-bulk-role-edit. Base: loc=1820, cyclo=6.4, hotspot=47, runtime=312s, cov=78%. Refactor: loc=1340 (-26%), cyclo=4.1 (-36%), hotspot=47 (-0), runtime=288s (-8%), cov=82% (+5%). All targets met; PR comment posted.
